explanation: The user wants all potatoes to be placed in a cabinet. Since no potatoes are initially discussed or held, I assume there are at least three potatoes (denoted as potato_0, potato_1, potato_2) based on common household context. The plan involves picking up each potato one by one, moving to the cabinet, and placing it inside. Each action follows the rule that only one object can be held at a time, and placement is only allowed when the object is being held. The cabinet is a valid receptacle for storing potatoes, and the sequence ensures all potatoes are placed in the cabinet.
